note: S3 bucket with no server-side encryption and no compensating control. Hunter builds the misconfig chain, skeptic finds no mitigation -> confirmed. Finding stays visible.

finding.title: Ensure S3 bucket has access logging enabled

llm_responses.content: {"exploit_chain":"the S3 bucket holds sensitive data and lacks server-side encryption and access logging, so objects are stored unencrypted and access is unaudited","evidence":[{"kind":"resource","file":"infra/s3.tf","line":1,"snippet":"resource \"aws_s3_bucket\" \"data\""}]}
{"mitigation_found":false,"reasoning":"no logging block or encryption rule on the bucket"}
